observation.summary: Distribution host local IPC docs described helper runtime and consent rules, but remained manually edited Markdown outside CI-backed source anchor checks.

hypothesis.summary: A local-ipc manifest can generate the endpoint, helper, external provider CLI, Windows MSIX, and consent pages while verifying hostintegration and store contract anchors.

execution.summary: Generate the local IPC index and detail pages from SSOT fragments without changing runtime behavior.

evaluation.summary: The verifier rejects generated doc drift, missing source anchors, missing fragments, missing workflow wiring, and missing coverage registration.

retrospective.summary: C11 local IPC knowledge becomes generated evidence and reduces the largest remaining manual domain hotspot without changing daemon runtime behavior.

evidence.proves: distribution host local IPC docs are generated and source anchors still exist
local IPC, helper runtime, consent, CLI defaults, and store distribution contracts still match the generated boundary
public CI uploads distribution host local IPC evidence
